title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, …) behind a simple REST/CLI API with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API (Node & browsers).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM/Chat/Embed endpoints.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, admin, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with history & prompt themes.

title: ollama-copilot (sberyozkin/ollama-copilot)
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm (terrytangyuan/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag (glangchain/ollama-rag)
summary: Ready-to-run RAG pipeline combining Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama (Spring-friendly).

title: ollama-nuxt (nuxt-ollama)
summary: Nuxt 3 module exposing server-side Ollama client composables.

title: ollama-dagger (dagger/ollama-dagger)
summary: Dagger CI module to pull & serve Ollama models inside pipelines.

title: ollama-chat (jacoblee/ollama-chat)
summary: Minimal Next.js chat app using Ollama via Vercel AI SDK.

title: ollama-obsidian (ollama-obsidian-plugin)
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM assistance inside notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-go (mxyng/ollama-go)
summary: Unofficial Go client for Ollama API with context cancellation.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/ollama-haystack)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators in pipelines.

title: ollama-docker-compose (ollama/ollama-docker)
summary: Official Docker Compose templates for CPU & GPU Ollama setups.

title: ollama-curl (rhanekom/ollama-curl)
summary: Lightweight Bash library wrapping ollama calls with curl & jq.

title: ollama-rust (andthattoo/ollama-rs)
summary: Rust crate providing async client for Ollama API.

title: ollama-zig (Cloudef/ollama-zig)
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with build.zig integration.
